            "text": "  // Corridor rubble: block some corridor tiles (distinct dark tiles, impassable)",

          },
          {
            "text": "  const corridorTiles: { x: number; y: number }[] = [];",

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {

          {
            "text": "function computeReachableTiles(",

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "while (queue.length &gt; 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (const [dx, dy] of [[0, -1], [0, 1], [-1, 0], [1, 0]]) {",

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "({",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "text": "      id: 'transporter-1',",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "      type: 'transporter',",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "      gridX: spawnX,",
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "      gridY: spawnY,",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "      label: 'Transporter pad',",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Books: 2-4 fragments per map, one per room, never in spawn room",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Only use rooms/tiles reachable from spawn (rubble can block corridors)",
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "text": "    const reachable = this.mapData.reachableTiles;",
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "text": "    const roomData = getOpenTilesInRoom(rooms, walls, { x: spawnX, y: spawnY })",
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "text": "      .map(({ room, tiles }) =&gt; ({",
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "text": "        room,",
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "text": "        tiles: tiles.filter((t) =&gt; reachable.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;)),",
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "      }))",
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "text": "      .filter(({ tiles }) =&gt; tiles.length &gt; 0);",
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "text": "    const spawnRoom = getRoomAt(rooms, spawnX, spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "text": "    const bookRoomData = spawnRoom",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "      ? roomData.filter(({ room }) =&gt; room !== spawnRoom)",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "      : roomData;",
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (bookRoomData.length === 0) return;",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "text": "    const count = Math.min(",
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "text": "      2 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 3),",
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "text": "      bookRoomData.length,",
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "text": "      4",
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "text": "    );",
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "text": "    const fragments = getRandomFragmentsForMapSync(count);",
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "text": "    const distFromSpawn = (r: GeneratedRoom) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "      Math.abs(r.centerX - spawnX) + Math.abs(r.centerY - spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "text": "    const farRooms = bookRoomData.filter(({ room }) =&gt; distFromSpawn(room) &gt;= 8);",
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "    const nearRooms = bookRoomData.filter(({ room }) =&gt; distFromSpawn(room) &lt; 8);",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": "    const shuffledFar = [...farRooms].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "    const shuffledNear = [...nearRooms].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 571
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 763,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.35530540347099304
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {

        "range": {

        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": " * Create a static test tilemap for Phase 1.3.",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": " * Ground layer, wall/collision layer, decoration layer.",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "export function createStaticTestMap(): {",
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  ground: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  walls: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  decoration: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "} {",
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const ground: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  const walls: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  const decoration: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    ground.push([]);",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls.push([]);",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "    decoration.push([]);",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "      const isBorder =",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "        x === 0 || x === MAP_WIDTH - 1 || y === 0 || y === MAP_HEIGHT - 1;",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "      const inRoom1 =",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "        x &gt;= 5 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 15 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 5 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 15; // Library wing",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "      const inRoom2 =",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "        x &gt;= 30 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 45 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 10 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 25; // Reading room",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "      const inRoom3 = x &gt;= 20 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 35 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 35 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 45; // Courtyard",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "      const inCorridor =",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "        (x &gt;= 15 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 25 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 20 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 30) ||",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "        (y &gt;= 15 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 20 &amp;&amp; x &gt;= 15 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 45);",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (isBorder) {",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.DIRT;",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (inRoom1 || inRoom2) {",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.STONE_FLOOR;",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (inRoom3) {",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.GRASS;",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (inCorridor) {",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.FLOOR;",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = x % 3 === 0 ? TILE.GRASS : TILE.DIRT;",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = Math.random() &lt; 0.03 ? TILE.RUBBLE : TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "      decoration[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (walls[y][x] === TILE.EMPTY &amp;&amp; Math.random() &lt; 0.02) {",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "        decoration[y][x] = Math.random() &lt; 0.5 ? TILE.VINE : TILE.DEBRIS;",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Wall boundaries for rooms",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let x = 5; x &lt;= 15; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[5][x] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[15][x] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 5; y &lt;= 15; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[y][5] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[y][15] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "  walls[10][5] = TILE.EMPTY; // Door",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let x = 30; x &lt;= 45; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[10][x] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 85,

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export function generateMap(): GeneratedMap {",
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "text": "  const reachableTiles = computeReachableTiles(walls, spawnX, spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "  return {",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "    ground,",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls,",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "    decoration,",
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: taggedRooms,",
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX,",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY,",
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "text": "    floodedTiles,",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "    reachableTiles,",
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "text": "  };",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": " * BFS from (sx, sy) over walkable tiles (walls EMPTY). Returns coord strings \"x,y\".",
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "text": "function computeReachableTiles(",
            "lineNumber": 239,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  walls: MapLayer,",
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  sx: number,",
            "lineNumber": 241,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  sy: number",
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "): Set&lt;string&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const reached = new Set&lt;string&gt;();",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "  const queue: { x: number; y: number }[] = [{ x: sx, y: sy }];",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "  reached.add(&#96;${sx},${sy}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "  while (queue.length &gt; 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { x, y } = queue.shift()!;",
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (const [dx, dy] of [[0, -1], [0, 1], [-1, 0], [1, 0]]) {",
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": "      const nx = x + dx;",
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": "      const ny = y + dy;",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./PLAN.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create HUD.tsx:",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Shows current area name",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Shows fragment count (e.g., \"📚 3/47 fragments recovered\")",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Positioned as a non-intrusive bar at top of screen",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Semantic HTML: &#96;&lt;header role=\"banner\"&gt;&#96; with proper heading",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create AccessibleLog.tsx:",
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "text": "  - An &#96;aria-live=\"polite\"&#96; region that receives text descriptions of game events",
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "text": "  - \"You entered the Ruined Library of Congress\"",
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": "  - \"You found a book fragment nearby\"",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "text": "  - \"You picked up Canto I of Dante's Inferno\"",
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Visually hidden (CSS) but available to screen readers",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": "  - This is the accessibility groundwork — every important game event gets a text log entry",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create DialogueBox.tsx (basic version):",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Renders dialogue text in a styled box at bottom of screen",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Advance with Space/Enter, close when dialogue ends",
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Semantic HTML with &#96;role=\"dialog\"&#96; and &#96;aria-modal=\"true\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1.7 — Phase 1 Milestone ✅",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "**✅ Done when**: You can move a character on a tile-based map, bump into walls,",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "face an object and see an interaction prompt, and see a basic HUD overlay.",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "The accessible event log quietly captures movement and interaction events.",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "## Phase 2: Core Game Loop (Proof of Concept)",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.1 — Procedural Map Generation",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create MapGenerator.ts using rot.js:",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Use &#96;ROT.Map.Digger&#96; for interior ruins (hallways, rooms)",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "  - (ROT.Map.Cellular for overgrown outdoor — deferred; Digger + decoration suffices)",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Generate a 50x50 tile map as a 2D number array",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Transform the rot.js output into Phaser tilemap-compatible data:",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "    - 0 (open) → random floor/ground tile indices",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "    - 1 (wall) → random wall/rubble tile indices",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "    - Apply variety: multiple tile indices per type for visual interest",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Create the tilemap dynamically in Phaser using &#96;this.make.tilemap({ data, tileWidth: 32, tileHeight: 32 })&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Add a decoration pass:",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Scatter vegetation (vines) on floor tiles (low probability)",
            "lineNumber": 209
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.32162749767303467

          {

          },
          {
            "text": "  private lastRoomName: string | null = null;",

          },
          {
            "text": "  private revealedRoomNames = new Set&lt;string&gt;();",

          },
          {
            "text": "  private wallOutline!: Phaser.GameObjects.Graphics;",

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "  private bookContainers = new Map&lt;string, Phaser.GameObjects.Container&gt;();",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "  private journalContainers = new Map&lt;string, Phaser.GameObjects.Container&gt;();",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "  private batteryContainers = new Map&lt;string, Phaser.GameObjects.Container&gt;();",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "  private npcBlockedTiles = new Set&lt;string&gt;();",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "  private moveCount = 0;",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/scenes/ExploreScene.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 25
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 762,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 26,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 26,
                "column": 16
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 26,
                "column": 16
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 27,
                "column": 3
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "const batteryRooms = (() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 523
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let i = 0; i &lt; batteryCount; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 524
          },
          {
            "text": "      const { tiles } = batteryRooms[i];",
            "lineNumber": 525
          },
          {
            "text": "      const available = tiles.filter(",
            "lineNumber": 526
          },
          {
            "text": "        (t) =&gt; !usedTiles.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;) &amp;&amp; !isAdjacentToUsed(t.x, t.y)",
            "lineNumber": 527
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 528
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (available.length === 0) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 529
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 530
          },
          {
            "text": "      const tile = available[Math.floor(Math.random() * available.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 531
          },
          {
            "text": "      usedTiles.add(&#96;${tile.x},${tile.y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 532
          },
          {
            "text": "      const batteryId = &#96;battery-${i}&#96;;",
            "lineNumber": 533
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 534
          },
          {
            "text": "      const px = tile.x * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 535
          },
          {
            "text": "      const py = tile.y * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 536
          },
          {
            "text": "      const container = this.add.container(px, py);",
            "lineNumber": 537
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.setDepth(5);",
            "lineNumber": 538
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 539
          },
          {
            "text": "      const shadow = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 540
          },
          {
            "text": "      shadow.fillStyle(0x1a1a2e, 0.6);",
            "lineNumber": 541
          },
          {
            "text": "      shadow.fillCircle(0, 2, 14);",
            "lineNumber": 542
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(shadow);",
            "lineNumber": 543
          },
          {
            "text": "      const outlineRing = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 544
          },
          {
            "text": "      outlineRing.lineStyle(5, 0x1a1a2e, 1);",
            "lineNumber": 545
          },
          {
            "text": "      outlineRing.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);",
            "lineNumber": 546
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(outlineRing);",
            "lineNumber": 547
          },
          {
            "text": "      const ring = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 548
          },
          {
            "text": "      ring.lineStyle(3, 0x5cb85c, 1); // Green — battery/energy",
            "lineNumber": 549
          },
          {
            "text": "      ring.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);",
            "lineNumber": 550
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(ring);",
            "lineNumber": 551
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add",
            "lineNumber": 552
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 570
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 571
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 763,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2920772135257721
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./PLAN.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 207
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 248
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- [x] Add a decoration pass:",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Scatter vegetation (vines) on floor tiles (low probability)",
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Add rubble/debris on tiles adjacent to walls (medium probability)",
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "text": "  - (Light sources deferred — tileset has no dedicated tile)",
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Implement room identification:",
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "text": "  - rot.js Digger provides room data (rectangles with coordinates)",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Tag rooms with purposes: \"library wing\", \"reading room\", \"archives\", \"courtyard\", etc.",
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Room names feed into the HUD and accessible log via area-entered",
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.2 — Field of View &amp; Fog of War",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Implement FOVSystem.ts using &#96;ROT.FOV.PreciseShadowcasting&#96;:",
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Calculate visible tiles from player position with radius 8",
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Three tile states: unexplored (black), explored-but-not-visible (dim), visible (full brightness)",
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Update FOV on every player move",
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Apply as alpha/tint on the Phaser tilemap layers",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Store explored tiles in the game state so they persist within a session",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] When a new room is revealed, emit 'area-entered' event with the room name",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.3 — Book Fragment Placement &amp; Collection",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Define the book data model in &#96;src/data/books.ts&#96;:",
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript",
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": "interface Book {",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": "  id: string;",
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "text": "  title: string;           // \"The Divine Comedy\"",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "  author: string;          // \"Dante Alighieri\"",
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "text": "  totalFragments: number;  // 34 (for Inferno's 34 cantos)",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": "  fragments: Fragment[];",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": "interface Fragment {",
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "text": "  id: string;",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "text": "  bookId: string;",
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "text": "  label: string;           // \"Canto I\"",
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "text": "  order: number;           // 1",
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "text": "  text: string;            // Full text from Project Gutenberg",
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "text": "  discovered: boolean;",
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create an initial book catalog with 3-5 books, each with a few fragments loaded:",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Dante's Inferno (select 3-4 cantos)",
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Shakespeare's The Tempest (5 acts)",
            "lineNumber": 248
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2745122015476227
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./EDITING.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 76
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 164
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "      - text: \"Second paragraph. Advance with Space.\"",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "### Add a New Journal",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "Add to the &#96;journals&#96; list:",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "  - id: journal-unique-id",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "    title: Short title (e.g. \"Faded note\")",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "    lines:",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "      - text: \"Your lore or flavor text here.\"",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "1–2 random journals are placed per map.",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "## 3. Books &amp; Fragments",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "Books have two parts:",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **Metadata** in &#96;public/content/books.yaml&#96; (title, author, fragment list)",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **Text** in separate &#96;.txt&#96; files under &#96;public/content/texts/&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "### Add a New Book",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "1. Create a folder for the book: &#96;public/content/texts/mybook/&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "2. Add the text file(s): &#96;public/content/texts/mybook/chapter-1.txt&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "   Just paste the text directly. No special formatting needed.",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "   ",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "   Multiple paragraphs work fine.",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "3. Add the book metadata to &#96;public/content/books.yaml&#96;:",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "     - id: mybook",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "       title: My Book Title",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "       author: Author Name",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "       totalFragments: 1",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "       fragments:",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "         - id: mybook-chapter-1",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "           label: Chapter 1",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "           order: 1",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "           textFile: mybook/chapter-1.txt",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "### Add a Fragment to an Existing Book",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "1. Add the text file: &#96;public/content/texts/inferno/canto-5.txt&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "2. Add the fragment to the book's &#96;fragments&#96; list in &#96;books.yaml&#96;:",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "         - id: inferno-canto-5",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "           label: Canto V",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "           order: 5",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "           textFile: inferno/canto-5.txt",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "3. Update &#96;totalFragments&#96; if you want the HUD to show accurate counts",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "### Fragment Fields",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;id&#96;: Unique identifier (e.g., &#96;inferno-canto-1&#96;)",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;label&#96;: Display name (e.g., \"Canto I\")",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;order&#96;: Sort order within the book",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;textFile&#96;: Path relative to &#96;public/content/texts/&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "## 4. Room Names",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "**File:** &#96;public/content/rooms.yaml&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "Room names are randomly assigned to generated rooms:",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "roomNames:",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "  - library wing",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "  - reading room",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "  - archives",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "  - courtyard",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "  - stacks",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "  - rotunda",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "Add, remove, or rename entries freely. These show in the HUD and in NPC dialogue hints.",
            "lineNumber": 164
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2713690996170044
    },

          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 222

        "range": {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "3. Object placement (books, NPCs, items) happens on a separate layer",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "4. The Phaser scene loads the generated tilemap and places entities",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "### rot-js Imports",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "- Map: &#96;import { Map } from 'rot-js'&#96; → &#96;new Map.Digger(...)&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "- FOV: &#96;import { FOV } from 'rot-js'&#96; → &#96;new FOV.PreciseShadowcasting(lightPasses)&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "- lightPasses(x, y) returns true when tile is walkable (not a wall)",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "### Player Entity (IControllablePlayer)",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "- Uses a Phaser **Container** containing: highlight ring (Graphics) + sprite. Camera and GridMovement target the container via &#96;getSprite()&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;getPixelPosition()&#96; for UI placement (e.g. interaction prompt above player). Don't assume &#96;getSprite()&#96; has &#96;.x&#96;/&#96;.y&#96; — use &#96;getPixelPosition()&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "- Highlight ring is for accessibility; keep it when iterating on player visuals.",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "### Interaction System",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "- Prompts show **only when standing ON the interactive tile**, not when adjacent and facing. Avoid re-adding \"tile in front\" logic — it caused false prompts.",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Battery pickups**: Stored as inventory (&#96;spareBatteries&#96;). Press **B** to use one (restores 50%). No waste when picking up at high battery.",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "### Depth Ordering (ExploreScene)",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "- Ground 0, wall 1, decoration 2, wall outline 2.5, fog overlay 4, interactives 5, player 10, prompt 100. New visuals should slot into this order.",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "### Book Pickup Visibility",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "- Books and their gold rings stay **full brightness** through fog — never dim. Makes them easy to spot when in FOV. Subtle scale pulse (1 ↔ 1.08) draws the eye.",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "### NPC Torchlight",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "- NPCs have a warm glow (torchlight) when in view — they look lit, but don't extend FOV (would spoil exploration).",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "### Object Placement",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "- **No adjacent placement**: Books, NPCs, journals, and batteries must not be placed on tiles directly adjacent (cardinal directions) to each other, the spawn, or the transporter. Filter candidates with &#96;!isAdjacentToUsed(x, y)&#96; before placing.",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "- **NPCs and books**: NPCs are never placed in the same room as a book fragment. Use &#96;roomsWithBooks&#96; to exclude those rooms from &#96;npcRoomData&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "### BootScene Procedural Textures",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "- Placeholder sprites (player, book-pickup, transporter-pad, npc) are created with &#96;add.graphics()&#96;, drawn, &#96;generateTexture(key, w, h)&#96;, then &#96;destroy()&#96;. Replace with asset loading when tilesets are ready.",
            "lineNumber": 115
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.24021659791469574
    }
  ]
}

            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "      centerY,",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "  });",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "  const FLOOR_TILES = [TILE.FLOOR, TILE.STONE_FLOOR] as const;",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "  const WALL_TILES = [TILE.WALL, TILE.RUBBLE] as const;",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "      const raw = rawMap[x][y];",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "      const isOpen = raw === 0 || raw === 2;",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (isOpen) {",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "        const inRoom = taggedRooms.some(",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "          (r) =&gt; x &gt;= r.x1 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= r.x2 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= r.y1 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= r.y2",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "        );",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] =",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "          FLOOR_TILES[Math.floor(Math.random() * FLOOR_TILES.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (inRoom) {",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "          ground[y][x] = TILE.STONE_FLOOR;",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.DIRT;",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] =",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "          WALL_TILES[Math.floor(Math.random() * WALL_TILES.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 1; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT - 1; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let x = 1; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH - 1; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (walls[y][x] !== TILE.EMPTY) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "      const adjacentToWall = [",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "        [x - 1, y],",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "        [x + 1, y],",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "        [x, y - 1],",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "        [x, y + 1],",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "      ].some(([nx, ny]) =&gt; walls[ny]?.[nx] &amp;&amp; walls[ny][nx] !== TILE.EMPTY);",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (adjacentToWall &amp;&amp; Math.random() &lt; 0.25) {",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "        decoration[y][x] = TILE.DEBRIS;",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "        !adjacentToWall &amp;&amp;",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] === TILE.STONE_FLOOR &amp;&amp;",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "        Math.random() &lt; 0.03",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "      ) {",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "        decoration[y][x] = TILE.VINE;",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Corridor rubble: block some corridor tiles (distinct dark tiles, impassable)",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "  const floodedTiles = new Set&lt;string&gt;();",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "}",

          }
        ]

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/systems/MapGenerator.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          },

          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export interface GeneratedMap {",
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  ground: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "  walls: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "  decoration: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "  rooms: GeneratedRoom[];",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "  spawnX: number;",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "  spawnY: number;",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "  /** Tile coords \"x,y\" that are flooded (passable but slow) */",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "  floodedTiles: Set&lt;string&gt;;",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "  /** Tile coords \"x,y\" reachable from spawn (BFS after rubble). Items only placed here. */",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "  reachableTiles: Set&lt;string&gt;;",
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": " * Generate a procedural ruin map using ROT.Map.Digger.",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": " * Returns ground, walls, decoration layers + room metadata.",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "export function generateMap(): GeneratedMap {",
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const ground: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "  const walls: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "  const decoration: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "    ground.push(new Array(MAP_WIDTH).fill(TILE.DIRT));",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls.push(new Array(MAP_WIDTH).fill(TILE.EMPTY));",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "    decoration.push(new Array(MAP_WIDTH).fill(TILE.EMPTY));",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "  const digger = new ROTMap.Digger(",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "    MAP_WIDTH,",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "    MAP_HEIGHT,",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "    {",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "      roomWidth: [5, 12],",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "      roomHeight: [4, 8],",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "      corridorLength: [2, 8],",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "      dugPercentage: 0.25,",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "  );",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "  const rawMap: number[][] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "    rawMap[x] = new Array(MAP_HEIGHT).fill(1);",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "  digger.create((x: number, y: number, value: number) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (x &gt;= 0 &amp;&amp; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 0 &amp;&amp; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT) {",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "      rawMap[x][y] = value;",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "  });",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "  const rooms = digger.getRooms() as Array&lt;{ _x1: number; _y1: number; _x2: number; _y2: number }&gt;;",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "  const roomNames = getRoomNames();",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "  const shuffledNames = [...roomNames].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "  const taggedRooms: GeneratedRoom[] = rooms.map((room, i) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "    const x1 = room._x1;",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "    const y1 = room._y1;",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "    const x2 = room._x2;",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "    const y2 = room._y2;",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "    const centerX = Math.floor((x1 + x2) / 2);",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "    const centerY = Math.floor((y1 + y2) / 2);",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "    return {",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "      name: shuffledNames[i % shuffledNames.length],",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "      x1,",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "  };",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export function generateMap(): GeneratedMap {",
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "for (let y = 1; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT - 1; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "for (let x = 1; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH - 1; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Corridor rubble: block some corridor tiles (distinct dark tiles, impassable)",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "  const floodedTiles = new Set&lt;string&gt;();",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },
          {
            "text": "  const inRoom = (x: number, y: number) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "    taggedRooms.some((r) =&gt; x &gt;= r.x1 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= r.x2 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= r.y1 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= r.y2);",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "text": "  const corridorTiles: { x: number; y: number }[] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 1; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT - 1; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let x = 1; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH - 1; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (walls[y][x] !== TILE.EMPTY) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (!inRoom(x, y)) corridorTiles.push({ x, y });",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "  const rubbleCount = Math.min(5 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 8), corridorTiles.length);",
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "text": "  const shuffledCorridors = [...corridorTiles].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let i = 0; i &lt; rubbleCount; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { x, y } = shuffledCorridors[i];",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[y][x] = TILE.RUBBLE;",
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Flooded tiles: passable but slow, visually distinct (blue-gray overlay)",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "  const floorTiles: { x: number; y: number }[] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (walls[y][x] === TILE.EMPTY &amp;&amp; decoration[y][x] === TILE.EMPTY) {",
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "        floorTiles.push({ x, y });",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "text": "  const floodCount = Math.min(3 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 5), floorTiles.length);",
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "  const shuffledFloors = [...floorTiles].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let i = 0; i &lt; floodCount; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { x, y } = shuffledFloors[i];",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "text": "    decoration[y][x] = TILE.FLOODED;",
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "    floodedTiles.add(&#96;${x},${y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "  let spawnX = Math.floor(MAP_WIDTH / 2);",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "  let spawnY = Math.floor(MAP_HEIGHT / 2);",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "  const spawnRoom = taggedRooms[0];",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (spawnRoom &amp;&amp; walls[spawnRoom.centerY]?.[spawnRoom.centerX] === TILE.EMPTY) {",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX = spawnRoom.centerX;",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY = spawnRoom.centerY;",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "  } else if (spawnRoom) {",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let dy = -1; dy &lt;= 1; dy++) {",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "text": "      for (let dx = -1; dx &lt;= 1; dx++) {",
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "text": "        const tx = spawnRoom.centerX + dx;",
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "text": "        const ty = spawnRoom.centerY + dy;",
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (walls[ty]?.[tx] === TILE.EMPTY) {",
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "text": "          spawnX = tx;",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "text": "          spawnY = ty;",
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "text": "          break;",
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "text": "  // BFS from spawn to get reachable tiles (after rubble) — items only placed here",
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "text": "  const reachableTiles = computeReachableTiles(walls, spawnX, spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "  return {",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "    ground,",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls,",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "    decoration,",
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: taggedRooms,",
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": " * Create a static test tilemap for Phase 1.3.",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": " * Ground layer, wall/collision layer, decoration layer.",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "export function createStaticTestMap(): {",
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  ground: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  walls: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  decoration: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "} {",
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const ground: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  const walls: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  const decoration: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    ground.push([]);",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls.push([]);",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "    decoration.push([]);",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "      const isBorder =",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "        x === 0 || x === MAP_WIDTH - 1 || y === 0 || y === MAP_HEIGHT - 1;",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "      const inRoom1 =",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "        x &gt;= 5 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 15 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 5 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 15; // Library wing",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "      const inRoom2 =",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "        x &gt;= 30 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 45 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 10 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 25; // Reading room",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "      const inRoom3 = x &gt;= 20 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 35 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 35 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 45; // Courtyard",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "      const inCorridor =",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "        (x &gt;= 15 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 25 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 20 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 30) ||",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "        (y &gt;= 15 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 20 &amp;&amp; x &gt;= 15 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 45);",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (isBorder) {",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.DIRT;",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (inRoom1 || inRoom2) {",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.STONE_FLOOR;",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (inRoom3) {",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.GRASS;",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (inCorridor) {",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.FLOOR;",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = x % 3 === 0 ? TILE.GRASS : TILE.DIRT;",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = Math.random() &lt; 0.03 ? TILE.RUBBLE : TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "      decoration[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (walls[y][x] === TILE.EMPTY &amp;&amp; Math.random() &lt; 0.02) {",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "        decoration[y][x] = Math.random() &lt; 0.5 ? TILE.VINE : TILE.DEBRIS;",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Wall boundaries for rooms",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let x = 5; x &lt;= 15; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[5][x] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[15][x] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 5; y &lt;= 15; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[y][5] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[y][15] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "  walls[10][5] = TILE.EMPTY; // Door",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let x = 30; x &lt;= 45; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[10][x] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.39470863342285156
    },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "import { Map as ROTMap } from 'rot-js';",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },

            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "const DEFAULT_ROOM_NAMES = [",

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {
            "text": "  'courtyard',",

          },

            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  'rotunda',",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "  'vestibule',",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  'study',",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  'scriptorium',",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "] as const;",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "// Cached room names loaded from content/rooms.yaml",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "let _roomNamesCache: string[] | null = null;",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "export function setRoomNamesCache(names: string[]): void {",
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "}",

            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "export function getRoomNames(): string[] {",
            "lineNumber": 31,

          },
          {

          },
          {

            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {

          },

          {
            "text": "export function generateMap(): GeneratedMap {",
            "lineNumber": 62,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "text": "  const reachableTiles = computeReachableTiles(walls, spawnX, spawnY);",

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": " * BFS from (sx, sy) over walkable tiles (walls EMPTY). Returns coord strings \"x,y\".",
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "text": "function computeReachableTiles(",
            "lineNumber": 239,
