          },
          {
            "text": "  walls: MapLayer,",
            "lineNumber": 240,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {

            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  sy: number",
            "lineNumber": 242,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "): Set&lt;string&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 243,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const reached = new Set&lt;string&gt;();",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "  const queue: { x: number; y: number }[] = [{ x: sx, y: sy }];",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "  reached.add(&#96;${sx},${sy}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "  while (queue.length &gt; 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { x, y } = queue.shift()!;",
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (const [dx, dy] of [[0, -1], [0, 1], [-1, 0], [1, 0]]) {",
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": "      const nx = x + dx;",
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": "      const ny = y + dy;",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "isSignature": true

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "function computeReachableTiles(",

            "isSignature": true

            "isSignature": true
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 241,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 243,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "while (queue.length &gt; 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (const [dx, dy] of [[0, -1], [0, 1], [-1, 0], [1, 0]]) {",
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": "      const nx = x + dx;",
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": "      const ny = y + dy;",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (nx &lt; 0 || nx &gt;= MAP_WIDTH || ny &lt; 0 || ny &gt;= MAP_HEIGHT) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (walls[ny][nx] !== TILE.EMPTY) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": "      const key = &#96;${nx},${ny}&#96;;",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (reached.has(key)) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "      reached.add(key);",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "      queue.push({ x: nx, y: ny });",
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "  return reached;",
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",

          },

          },
          {
            "text": " */",

          },
          {
            "text": "export function getOpenTilesInRoom(",

          },
          {
            "text": "  return rooms",

          },
          {
            "text": "    .filter((r) =&gt; walls[r.centerY]?.[r.centerX] === TILE.EMPTY)",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "    .map((room) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "      const tiles: { x: number; y: number }[] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "}",

          }
        ]

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },

            "text": "    this.wallLayer = wallMapData.createLayer(0, wallTileset, 0, 0)!;",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.wallLayer.setDepth(1);",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.wallLayer.setCollision([4, 5]); // Wall and rubble block",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Decoration layer (non-blocking)",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "    const decoMapData = this.make.tilemap({",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "      data: decoration,",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "      tileWidth: TILE_SIZE,",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "      tileHeight: TILE_SIZE,",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "    const decoTileset = decoMapData.addTilesetImage(",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "      'tileset',",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "      'tileset',",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "      TILE_SIZE,",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "      TILE_SIZE",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "    )!;",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.decorationLayer = decoMapData.createLayer(0, decoTileset, 0, 0)!;",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.decorationLayer.setDepth(2);",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Wall outline — thin border along wall edges for clarity",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.wallOutline = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.wallOutline.setDepth(2.5);",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Fog overlay — drawn on top of map, avoids Phaser layer APIs (see .cursor/rules)",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.fogOverlay = this.add.graphics();",

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Player entity",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {

          },
          {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "({",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "text": "      id: 'transporter-1',",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "      type: 'transporter',",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "      gridX: spawnX,",
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "      gridY: spawnY,",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "      label: 'Transporter pad',",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Books: 2-4 fragments per map, one per room, never in spawn room",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Only use rooms/tiles reachable from spawn (rubble can block corridors)",
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "text": "    const reachable = this.mapData.reachableTiles;",
            "lineNumber": 265
          },
          {
            "text": "    const roomData = getOpenTilesInRoom(rooms, walls, { x: spawnX, y: spawnY })",
            "lineNumber": 266
          },
          {
            "text": "      .map(({ room, tiles }) =&gt; ({",
            "lineNumber": 267
          },
          {
            "text": "        room,",
            "lineNumber": 268
          },
          {
            "text": "        tiles: tiles.filter((t) =&gt; reachable.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;)),",
            "lineNumber": 269
          },
          {
            "text": "      }))",
            "lineNumber": 270
          },
          {
            "text": "      .filter(({ tiles }) =&gt; tiles.length &gt; 0);",
            "lineNumber": 271
          },
          {
            "text": "    const spawnRoom = getRoomAt(rooms, spawnX, spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "text": "    const bookRoomData = spawnRoom",
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "      ? roomData.filter(({ room }) =&gt; room !== spawnRoom)",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "      : roomData;",
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (bookRoomData.length === 0) return;",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "text": "    const count = Math.min(",
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "text": "      2 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 3),",
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "text": "      bookRoomData.length,",
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "text": "      4",
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "text": "    );",
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "text": "    const fragments = getRandomFragmentsForMapSync(count);",
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "text": "    const distFromSpawn = (r: GeneratedRoom) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "      Math.abs(r.centerX - spawnX) + Math.abs(r.centerY - spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 286
          },
          {
            "text": "    const farRooms = bookRoomData.filter(({ room }) =&gt; distFromSpawn(room) &gt;= 8);",
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "    const nearRooms = bookRoomData.filter(({ room }) =&gt; distFromSpawn(room) &lt; 8);",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": "    const shuffledFar = [...farRooms].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "    const shuffledNear = [...nearRooms].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 571
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 763,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3027859926223755
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./PLAN.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 207
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 248
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- [x] Add a decoration pass:",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Scatter vegetation (vines) on floor tiles (low probability)",
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Add rubble/debris on tiles adjacent to walls (medium probability)",
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "text": "  - (Light sources deferred — tileset has no dedicated tile)",
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Implement room identification:",
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "text": "  - rot.js Digger provides room data (rectangles with coordinates)",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Tag rooms with purposes: \"library wing\", \"reading room\", \"archives\", \"courtyard\", etc.",
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Room names feed into the HUD and accessible log via area-entered",
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.2 — Field of View &amp; Fog of War",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Implement FOVSystem.ts using &#96;ROT.FOV.PreciseShadowcasting&#96;:",
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Calculate visible tiles from player position with radius 8",
            "lineNumber": 219
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Three tile states: unexplored (black), explored-but-not-visible (dim), visible (full brightness)",
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Update FOV on every player move",
            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Apply as alpha/tint on the Phaser tilemap layers",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Store explored tiles in the game state so they persist within a session",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] When a new room is revealed, emit 'area-entered' event with the room name",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.3 — Book Fragment Placement &amp; Collection",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Define the book data model in &#96;src/data/books.ts&#96;:",
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;typescript",
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": "interface Book {",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": "  id: string;",
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "text": "  title: string;           // \"The Divine Comedy\"",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "  author: string;          // \"Dante Alighieri\"",
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "text": "  totalFragments: number;  // 34 (for Inferno's 34 cantos)",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": "  fragments: Fragment[];",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": "interface Fragment {",
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "text": "  id: string;",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "text": "  bookId: string;",
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "text": "  label: string;           // \"Canto I\"",
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "text": "  order: number;           // 1",
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "text": "  text: string;            // Full text from Project Gutenberg",
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "text": "  discovered: boolean;",
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create an initial book catalog with 3-5 books, each with a few fragments loaded:",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Dante's Inferno (select 3-4 cantos)",
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Shakespeare's The Tempest (5 acts)",
            "lineNumber": 248
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.30088838934898376
    },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export function getOpenTilesInRoom(",
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  walls: MapLayer,",
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  exclude?: { x: number; y: number }",
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "): { room: GeneratedRoom; tiles: { x: number; y: number }[] }[] {",
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273
          },
          {
            "text": "    .map((room) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 274
          },
          {
            "text": "      const tiles: { x: number; y: number }[] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 275
          },
          {
            "text": "      for (let y = room.y1; y &lt;= room.y2; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 276
          },
          {
            "text": "        for (let x = room.x1; x &lt;= room.x2; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 277
          },
          {
            "text": "          if (walls[y]?.[x] === TILE.EMPTY &amp;&amp; !(exclude &amp;&amp; exclude.x === x &amp;&amp; exclude.y === y)) {",
            "lineNumber": 278
          },
          {
            "text": "            tiles.push({ x, y });",
            "lineNumber": 279
          },
          {
            "text": "          }",
            "lineNumber": 280
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 281
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 282
          },
          {
            "text": "      return { room, tiles };",
            "lineNumber": 283
          },
          {
            "text": "    })",
            "lineNumber": 284
          },
          {
            "text": "    .filter(({ tiles }) =&gt; tiles.length &gt; 0);",
            "lineNumber": 285
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 286,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 287
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": " * Get room name at grid position, or null if not in a room.",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "text": "export function getRoomAt(",
            "lineNumber": 291,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 292,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  x: number,",
            "lineNumber": 293,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  y: number",
            "lineNumber": 294,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "): GeneratedRoom | null {",
            "lineNumber": 295,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  ",
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 299,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/scenes/ExploreScene.ts",

        "signatures": {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "const batteryRooms = (() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 523
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let i = 0; i &lt; batteryCount; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 524
          },
          {
            "text": "      const { tiles } = batteryRooms[i];",
            "lineNumber": 525
          },
          {
            "text": "      const available = tiles.filter(",
            "lineNumber": 526
          },
          {
            "text": "        (t) =&gt; !usedTiles.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;) &amp;&amp; !isAdjacentToUsed(t.x, t.y)",
            "lineNumber": 527
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 528
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (available.length === 0) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 529
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 530
          },
          {
            "text": "      const tile = available[Math.floor(Math.random() * available.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 531
          },
          {
            "text": "      usedTiles.add(&#96;${tile.x},${tile.y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 532
          },
          {
            "text": "      const batteryId = &#96;battery-${i}&#96;;",
            "lineNumber": 533
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 534
          },
          {
            "text": "      const px = tile.x * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 535
          },
          {
            "text": "      const py = tile.y * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 536
          },
          {
            "text": "      const container = this.add.container(px, py);",
            "lineNumber": 537
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.setDepth(5);",
            "lineNumber": 538
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 539
          },
          {
            "text": "      const shadow = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 540
          },
          {
            "text": "      shadow.fillStyle(0x1a1a2e, 0.6);",
            "lineNumber": 541
          },
          {
            "text": "      shadow.fillCircle(0, 2, 14);",
            "lineNumber": 542
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(shadow);",
            "lineNumber": 543
          },
          {
            "text": "      const outlineRing = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 544
          },
          {
            "text": "      outlineRing.lineStyle(5, 0x1a1a2e, 1);",
            "lineNumber": 545
          },
          {
            "text": "      outlineRing.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);",
            "lineNumber": 546
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(outlineRing);",
            "lineNumber": 547
          },
          {
            "text": "      const ring = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 548
          },
          {
            "text": "      ring.lineStyle(3, 0x5cb85c, 1); // Green — battery/energy",
            "lineNumber": 549
          },
          {
            "text": "      ring.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);",
            "lineNumber": 550
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(ring);",
            "lineNumber": 551
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add",
            "lineNumber": 552
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 570
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 571
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 763,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/systems/GridMovement.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 25

        "signatures": {

              "startPosition": {

          ]

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export class GridMovement implements MovementController {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "  private isValidTarget(tx: number, ty: number): boolean {",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!this.context) return false;",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { wallLayer, mapWidth, mapHeight, getBlockedTiles } = this.context;",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (tx &lt; 0 || tx &gt;= mapWidth || ty &lt; 0 || ty &gt;= mapHeight) return false;",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (getBlockedTiles?.().has(&#96;${tx},${ty}&#96;)) return false;",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "    const tile = wallLayer.getTileAt(tx, ty);",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!tile || tile.index === -1) return true;",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": " * Zustand game store — Convex-shaped schema",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": " *",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": " * PLANNED CONVEX SCHEMA (for reference when migrating):",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": " * ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": " * tables: {",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": " *   players: defineTable({",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": " *     id: v.id(\"players\"),",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": " *     name: v.string(),",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": " *     position: v.object({ x: v.number(), y: v.number() }),",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": " *     currentMapId: v.string(),",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": " *     flashlightBattery: v.number(),",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": " *   }),",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": " *   library: defineTable({",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": " *     id: v.id(\"library\"),",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": " *     bookId: v.string(),",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": " *     label: v.string(),",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": " *     order: v.number(),",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": " *     text: v.string(),",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": " *     playerId: v.id(\"players\"),",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": " *   }),",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": " *   exploration: defineTable({",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": " *     playerId: v.id(\"players\"),",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": " *     visitedMaps: v.array(v.string()),",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": " *     discoveredNPCs: v.array(v.string()),",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },

          },

          },

            "text": " *   }),",

          },
          {
            "text": " * }",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": " * Actions become Convex mutations; use useQuery for player, library, exploration.",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": " * Session state stays client-only.",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": " * ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./PLAN.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 171
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 209

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create HUD.tsx:",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Shows current area name",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Shows fragment count (e.g., \"📚 3/47 fragments recovered\")",
            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Positioned as a non-intrusive bar at top of screen",
            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Semantic HTML: &#96;&lt;header role=\"banner\"&gt;&#96; with proper heading",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create AccessibleLog.tsx:",
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "text": "  - An &#96;aria-live=\"polite\"&#96; region that receives text descriptions of game events",
            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {
            "text": "  - \"You entered the Ruined Library of Congress\"",
            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {
            "text": "  - \"You found a book fragment nearby\"",
            "lineNumber": 180
          },
          {
            "text": "  - \"You picked up Canto I of Dante's Inferno\"",
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Visually hidden (CSS) but available to screen readers",
            "lineNumber": 182
          },
          {
            "text": "  - This is the accessibility groundwork — every important game event gets a text log entry",
            "lineNumber": 183
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create DialogueBox.tsx (basic version):",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Renders dialogue text in a styled box at bottom of screen",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Advance with Space/Enter, close when dialogue ends",
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Semantic HTML with &#96;role=\"dialog\"&#96; and &#96;aria-modal=\"true\"&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1.7 — Phase 1 Milestone ✅",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "**✅ Done when**: You can move a character on a tile-based map, bump into walls,",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "face an object and see an interaction prompt, and see a basic HUD overlay.",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "The accessible event log quietly captures movement and interaction events.",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "## Phase 2: Core Game Loop (Proof of Concept)",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.1 — Procedural Map Generation",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create MapGenerator.ts using rot.js:",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Use &#96;ROT.Map.Digger&#96; for interior ruins (hallways, rooms)",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "  - (ROT.Map.Cellular for overgrown outdoor — deferred; Digger + decoration suffices)",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Generate a 50x50 tile map as a 2D number array",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Transform the rot.js output into Phaser tilemap-compatible data:",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "    - 0 (open) → random floor/ground tile indices",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "    - 1 (wall) → random wall/rubble tile indices",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "    - Apply variety: multiple tile indices per type for visual interest",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Create the tilemap dynamically in Phaser using &#96;this.make.tilemap({ data, tileWidth: 32, tileHeight: 32 })&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Add a decoration pass:",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Scatter vegetation (vines) on floor tiles (low probability)",
            "lineNumber": 209
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.26489585638046265
    },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "create() {",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.checkRoomEntry(spawnX, spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.clearExploredTiles();",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.setExplorableTileCount(this.mapData.reachableTiles.size);",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.updateFOV(spawnX, spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "    // World bounds",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.physics.world.setBounds(",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "text": "      0,",
            "lineNumber": 209
          },
          {
            "text": "      0,",
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "text": "      MAP_WIDTH * TILE_SIZE,",
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "text": "      MAP_HEIGHT * TILE_SIZE",
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "text": "    );",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
